Two minor issues were identified: (1) the produced .xlsx could not be programmatically previewed in the grader environment because openpyxl was unavailable (grader relied on an OOXML fallback and the planner_patch_note.md text); (2) a small notation inconsistency in one sensitivity-formula line in planner_patch_note.md. These do not change numeric conclusions but reduce machine-verifiability and clarity. Recommend a short, local revision to improve parser compatibility and fix the notation for audit clarity.

Trace correctly records creation steps and causal links; no hidden-reference leakage observed.
